title: Top Greek court under fire after closing wiretapping scandal case
summary_full: Nikos Androulakis, leader of the main opposition socialist party PASOK and who was the first to discover that his phone had been compromised, said the decision “offended and undermined the authority of the judiciary"
summary_public: Nikos Androulakis, leader of the main opposition socialist party PASOK and who was the first to discover that his phone had been compromised, said the decision “offended and undermined the authority of the judiciary"
